title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta, founder at Replit, discusses how Claude's coding capabilities enable agentic AI building for non-programmers. Replit partnered with Anthropic in early 2024 and coordinates model releases with Claude's launch cycle. Over 40 million users use Replit's natural language coding interface.
